nasb.text: The sons of Manasseh: of Machir, the family of the Machirites; and Machir became the father of Gilead: of Gilead, the family of the Gileadites.

esv.text: The sons of Manasseh: of Machir, the clan of the Machirites; and Machir was the father of Gilead; of Gilead, the clan of the Gileadites.

cnv.text: 瑪拿西的子孫，屬瑪吉的，有瑪吉家族；瑪吉生基列；屬基列的，有基列家族。

ccb.text: 玛拿西的子孙有玛吉族和基列族。基列是玛吉的儿子。
